channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月19日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 We stopped AI bot spam in our GitHub repo using Git's –author flag #2 Show HN: Files.md – Open-source alternative to Obsidian #3 The Quiet Renovation at Bitwarden #4 Project Glasswing: what Mythos showed us #5 1024000^2 Blocks, 2B2T Minecraft Server World Download Project, and Discoveries #6 Voice AI Systems Are Vulnerable to Hidden Audio Attacks #7 What Is Date:Italy? #8 'We mould trees to grow into the shape of chairs' #9 When Kierkegaard Got Cancelled #10 The Aperiodic Table

item.title: 2026年5月19日（12:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事

item.description: #1 Anthropic acquires Stainless #2 Mexican government breached by solo user with Claude, 150 GB exfiltrated #3 Hyperpolyglot Lisp: Common Lisp, Racket, Clojure, Emacs Lisp #4 We stopped AI bot spam in our GitHub repo using Git's –author flag #5 We let AIs run radio stations #6 Who will buy your services if you fire us all? #7 Show HN: Files.md – Open-source alternative to Obsidian #8 The Quiet Renovation at Bitwarden #9 Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI #10 The Futility of Lava Lamps: What Random Means
